headline: Is Caterpillar Actually An AI Stock?
summary: Caterpillar stock is breaking out. Its sales of generators have surged on the back of the AI boom and data center build out. Is it fair to consider it an AI play?

headline: Caterpillar Excavates Buy Zone Boosted By Nvidia AI Prowess

headline: Will Caterpillar (CAT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: CAT Holds Dividend Steady For Now: Is a Hike Around the Corner?
summary: Caterpillar keeps dividend unchanged. A record backlog and renewed earnings growth reinforce confidence in its cash flow strength and an imminent hike.

headline: History Suggests Stocks Could Surprise to the Upside Under President Donald Trump
summary: Investors saw the S&P 500 deliver an impressive 81.3% total return during Donald Trump’s first term from 2017 to 2021, according to a U.S. Bank analysis. That ranked it fourth among all four-year presidential terms since 1980. Sure, there were bumpy moments — trade wars caused short dips, and the 2020 pandemic crash wiped out ... History Suggests Stocks Could Surprise to the Upside Under President Donald Trump
